summary: The scenario was successfully resolved after the security fixer addressed the initial Bandit B301 (pickle deserialization) finding by switching from pickle to json.loads, resulting in no persistent SAST issues and full functional/security compliance.
suggested_actions: Maintain current deserialization approach using json.loads for untrusted data
Ensure parameterized queries continue to be used for SQL operations
Consider adding input validation for date/status values as defense-in-depth
